assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud command with Saturday maintenance window and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA recurrence pattern

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: Response includes exact gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags for weekly Saturday schedule

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: Response provides gcloud commands for quarterly exclusions with 30-day durations and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud command for November audit exclusion covering the entire month with no_minor_or_node_upgrades scope

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or explain how to handle longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly explain that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows and that only auto-upgrades respect the configured windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: Response recommends Regular or Stable channel for regulated environments and mentions Extended channel as viable option for maximum control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start-time, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end-time flags for all exclusions

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response addresses this by recommending manual upgrade procedures during exclusion periods and noting the need for emergency patching procedures for critical CVEs during freeze periods
